message:
fix(storage): close git blob data_stream after reading

Ensure the data_stream from git blob objects is properly closed
after reading to prevent file handle leaks.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1622,7 +1622,12 @@ def _get_content() -> str | None:
             # Check size before reading
             if obj.size > max_size_bytes:
                 raise ValueError(f"File too large: {obj.size} bytes (max {max_size_bytes})")
-            return str(obj.data_stream.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace"))
+
+            stream = obj.data_stream
+            try:
+                return str(stream.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace"))
+            finally:
+                stream.close()
         except KeyError:
             return None
